name: sessionizer
title: Sessionizer
description: Fuzzy-find a project directory and open it in your terminal (wezterm workspaces or kitty tabs); can also jump to an already-open project.
author: julian-irizarry

commands.name: sessionizer
commands.title: Sessionizer
commands.subtitle: Jump to a project directory
commands.description: Pick a directory under the configured roots and open it in a terminal tab or workspace.

commands.name: find-open-session
commands.title: Find Open Session
commands.subtitle: Jump to an already-open wezterm workspace
commands.description: Lists wezterm workspaces currently running and switches to the chosen one.
